prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类/理科最低位次约 42114→47459→41196→46513→52849，整体呈波动后移趋势，近 2 年累计后移约 6200 名；2025 年基准约 52849 名，为近 5 年最高（最难进）；该校在河南省物理类/理科计划数：2021 年 135 人、2022 年 141 人、2023 年 142 人、2024 年 176 人、2025 年 180 人，逐年递增；2026 年计划 197 人，较 2025 年扩招约 9.4%，扩招幅度明显，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 173–198 名（2024 年第 173、2025 年第 198），排名略有下滑但仍属全国中上游水平；抖音热度排名第 106，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量较低；声誉文件中无青海大学相关负面或正面事件记录，报考心理层面无明显扰动；第五轮学科评估中青海大学无 A- 及以上等级学科，整体学科实力以农学、医学、工科为主，缺乏顶尖学科带动效应。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、临床医学等专业社会热度持续偏高 ，对高分考生吸引力强；河南省 2026 年考生总数约 120 万（含不确定标记），较 2025 年（约 90.7 万）大幅增加约 32%，竞争基数显著扩大；青海大学位于青海省西宁市，属西部偏远地区，对河南考生存在一定地域距离顾虑；该校在河南招生 人数逐年增加，2025 年物理类计划 180 人，2026 年增至 197 人，招生体量较大，地域因素对报考意愿的抑制作用有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划扩招约 9.4% 以及本省考生总数大幅增加约 32%，扩招虽部分缓解竞争但考生基数扩张效应更显著，预计 2026 年物理类最低位次在 2025 年基准 52849 名基础上继续后移；预测最低位次约 56044 名，区间 55544–56544 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category/Science in Henan was approximately 42114→47459→41196→46513→52849, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 6200 places in the last 2 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 52849, the highest (most difficult to enter) in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category/Science in Henan Province: 135 in 2021, 141 in 2022, 142 in 2023, 176 in 2024, 180 in 2025, increasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 197, an expansion of about 9.4% compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking in recent years is approximately 173–198 (173 in 2024, 198 in 2025), with a slight decline but still at the upper-middle level nationwide; Douyin popularity ranking is 106, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure; the reputation file has no records of negative or positive events related to Qinghai University, with no significant psychological disturbance in application; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no A- or above disciplines, with overall discipline strength mainly in agriculture, medicine, and engineering, lacking top-tier disciplines to drive influence.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, and Clinical Medicine have consistently high social popularity, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (including uncertain markers), a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 907,000), greatly expanding the competition base; Qinghai University is located in Xining City, Qinghai Province, a remote western area, causing some geographical distance concerns for Henan candidates; the university's enrollment in Henan has increased year by year, with 180 Physics Category places in 2025 and 197 in 2026, a relatively large enrollment volume, and the inhibitory effect of geographical factors on application willingness is limited.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the planned enrollment expansion of about 9.4% in 2026, and the significant increase of about 32% in the total number of candidates in the province, although the expansion partially alleviates competition, the expansion effect of the candidate base is more significant; it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to shift backward from the 2025 baseline of 52849; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 56044, with a range of 55544–56544.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 55544–56544, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<55544), you can focus on sprinting for popular majors such as Clinical Medicine and Electrical Engineering and Automation; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>56544), it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 8893→9039→8647→8811→7978, fluctuating within the 8000–9100 range. The 2025 ranking of 7978 is the lowest in the past 5 years (easiest to enter), moving significantly forward by about 833 places compared to 2024. The university's planned enrollment for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province: 20 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 17 in 2023, 10 in 2024, 14 in 2025; 17 in 2026, an increase of about 21.4% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science main ranking in recent years is approximately 173–198, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 106, rated as 'average'. There are no records of negative or positive events related to Qinghai University in the reputation documents, so there is no significant psychological disturbance in application. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Qinghai University has no disciplines rated A- or above, and its liberal arts majors (Business Administration, Tourism Management, International Economics and Trade, etc.) lack top-tier disciplinary support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Accounting and Financial Management have a social popularity leaning towards recommendation, while finance/economics/economic categories show differentiation and wait-and-see attitudes. The total number of examinees in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (including uncertain marks), a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 907,000), substantially expanding the competition base. Qinghai University is located in Xining, Qinghai Province, a remote western area, which may cause some geographical distance concerns for Henan liberal arts candidates. However, the university's enrollment plan for history category in Henan has increased from 10 in 2024 to 14 in 2025 and 17 in 2026, with a continuously expanding enrollment scale, limiting the impact of geographical factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormally low value of the significant forward shift in 2025 ranking (7978), the planned enrollment expansion of about 21.4% in 2026, and the substantial increase of about 32% in the total number of examinees in the province, the expansion is relatively large but the expansion effect of the examinee base is more significant. It is expected that the minimum ranking for history category in 2026 will shift backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8954, with a range of 8454–9454.
